name: Kahumana Farm Cafe
tagline: A farm-to-table cafe hidden deep in the Waianae Valley, serving food harvested from the surrounding organic gardens.
parking: Free lot on the farm property
talkStory: Hidden in the back valley of Waianae on an organic farm that doubles as a transitional housing community. The food is made with ingredients harvested that morning — fresh salads, hearty grain bowls, and baked goods. The setting, surrounded by mountains and farmland, feels a world away from Honolulu. Open Wed-Sat for lunch; call ahead to confirm hours. Locals treasure this place for its mission as much as its food.
